title: Ubiquiti UISP-FIBER-XG, UISP Fiber XG-PON ONU
description: UISP-FIBER-XG is a CPE ONU unit for XGS/XG-PON solutions. The device itself serves to convert optical GPON to metallic LAN and only supports Bridge mode, not Router mode. For connection to the XGS/XG-PON network, it uses 1x SC connector with APC polishing and a maximum speed of 9.95 Gb/s downstream and 2.44 Gb/s upstream. The transmitting power ranges from 2 to 7 dBm and the reception sensitivity from -9 to -27 dBm. For LAN connection there is 2.5G LAN port with 24V DC POE-IN support. Unit also… Unit 5V/3A USB-C power adapter Holder and mounting kit
